data.title: Chainlink Teams Up with Taiko to Power Institutional-Grade DeFi on Ethereum
data.description: TLDR: Chainlink Data Streams is now the official oracle provider for Taiko, supporting faster, secure market data delivery. data.title: Wormhole Releases W Token 2.0 Upgrade, Implementing a New Token Economic Model
data.description: The core elements of the Wormhole Reserve include the establishment of a Wormhole Reserve pool, a 4% target base yield, and an optimized biweekly unlocking mechanism. The total supply of W Tokens is capped at 10 billion, with approximately 4.7 billion currently in circulation. The new mechanism accumulates protocol revenue and ecosystem application value into the reserve pool, with returns comprised of existing tokens and protocol revenue, with no incremental inflation. Some allocation categories will have a 4.5-year linear unlocking period to enhance market stability and long-term incentives.

data.title: TBOS2025 concluded successfully, with QuBitDEX showcasing its proprietary Layer-1 blockchain, QuBitChain
data.description: The Taiwan Blockchain Online Summit (TBOS) 2025 concluded on September 10th, Taipei time, attracting global Web3 leaders and projects. Title sponsor QuBitDEX showcased its proprietary Layer-1 high-speed blockchain, QuBitChain, and emphasized its commitment to creating a next-generation trading platform that combines the performance of a centralized exchange (CEX) with the security of a decentralized exchange (DEX). Representatives from Animoca Brands, TON East Asia Hub, LBank Labs, and the Kaia Foundation shared their unique insights into the Asian market, covering public chain ecosystems, DeFi, digital asset investment, and regulatory trends. TBOS founders stated that Taiwan will continue to serve as a launching pad for international Web3 collaboration and innovation.
